hooks.command: found=""; for d in .planning/phases/*/; do [ -d "$d" ] || continue; ls "$d"*-CONTEXT.md >/dev/null 2>&1 || continue; ls "$d"*-PLAN.md >/dev/null 2>&1 && continue; found=$(basename "$d"); break; done; [ -n "$found" ] && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"GSD AUTO-RESUME SIGNAL: Phase %s has CONTEXT.md but no PLAN.md. This is a directive — immediately invoke /gsd:plan-phase for this phase without waiting for user instruction. Check .planning/STATE.md for any --prd flag to include."}}' "$found" || true

input=$(cat); echo "$input" | grep -qiE "(build|implement|create|add|design|make|write).{0,40}(component|page|feature|screen|ui|interface|util|hook|modal|form|button|card|nav|header|footer|drill|mcq|quiz|content|question|subject)" && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"UserPromptSubmit\",\"additionalContext\":\"ASCENDLY WORKFLOW GATE: This looks like a build/implement request. MANDATORY before writing any code: (1) Invoke superpowers:brainstorming if this is a new feature, component, or page. (2) Invoke superpowers:writing-plans for any multi-step implementation. (3) Read design-system/ascendly/MASTER.md before any UI work. (4) Follow Planner->Coder->Reviewer->Tester pipeline per CLAUDE.md. Do not skip these steps.\"}}" || true
